template:
specificationVersion: jobtemplate-2023-09
name: "Job Bundle with data"
description: This bundle is for testing 'deadline bundle submit'.
parameterDefinitions:
- name: InputDir
  type: PATH
  default: input
  dataFlow: IN
  objectType: DIRECTORY
- name: OutputDir
  type: PATH
  default: output
  dataFlow: OUT
  objectType: DIRECTORY
- name: InputOutputDir
  type: PATH
  default: input_output
  dataFlow: INOUT
  objectType: DIRECTORY
steps:
- name: Step
  script:
    actions:
      onRun:
        command: bash
        args: ["--help"]
  hostRequirements:
    attributes:
    - name: attr.worker.os.family
      anyOf:
      - linux
